name: Chocolate Prune Cake/ Fudge Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over prunes and let soak for 30 minutes.
2. Combine oil, sugar, 2 tablespoons cocoa, cinnamon, 1 teaspoon salt, and 1 teaspoon vanilla in a bowl. Add eggs and beat well for 2 minutes.
3. Blend the soaked prunes and buttermilk together finely. Mix this with the creamed mixture containing flour, baking soda, and baking powder. Beat until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 13 x 9-inch baking pan or two 8-inch round pans. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted near the center comes out clean. Allow to cool.
5. To make the frosting, bring water to boil. Remove from heat and beat in shortening and corn syrup. Gradually add sifted powdered sugar, 1/2 cup cocoa, 1/4 teaspoon salt, and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla until well combined and at a spreading consistency.
6. Frost the cooled cake.
